summary: Robotics Engineering student with a professional fabrication background — certified aerospace TIG welder, machine shop owner, and automation intern at a rocket startup — who designs, builds, and programs complete electromechanical systems from raw stock to closed-loop control.

education.degree: B.S. Robotics Engineering, Minor in Electrical Engineering
details: Relevant coursework: ECE 118 Mechatronics, ECE 121: Microcontroller System Design, ECE 167: Sensors and Sensor Technologies, ECE 100: Logic Design in Verilog, ECE 171: Analog Circuits

experience.title: Automation / Aerospace Engineering Intern
bullets: Designing and manufacturing technologies to optimize cost per unit payload weight of medium-sized rockets.
Creating, testing, and iterating automated systems for fixturing and laser welding of thrust chamber assemblies and fuel tanks.
Designed and fabricated a gas piston for the automation system providing constant force, smooth travel, and backpurge gas flow across a 42–75 mm length range at a total unit cost under $1.50.

experience.title: Owner / Operator
bullets: Founded and operate a business providing welding and fabrication services for equipment repair and commercial business solutions.
Scope, quote, and deliver projects across multiple industries; full responsibility for pricing, client communication, and project execution.
Maintain, modify, and service all shop equipment, including during ongoing projects, to ensure reliable delivery.

experience.company: HARE Research Lab, UC Santa Cruz
experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Contributed mechanical and technical work — CNC machining, CAD, soldering, electronics, and programming — toward development of a VTOL search-and-rescue drone.

experience.title: Project Estimator
bullets: Created accurate bids on large fabrication projects worth upwards of $40,000, securing work for a local welding business.

experience.title: Freelance Welder / Assistant
bullets: Assisted in commercial diving and underwater welding operations; set up and operated diver communication systems to ensure safe dives and accurate information transmission to customers.

experience.title: Welder / Steamfitter
bullets: Maintained fleet machines and equipment used on multimillion-dollar mechanical contracting jobs.
Read technical drawings to fabricate components for on-site installation.
Designed and fabricated shop systems and fixtures that improved productivity.

items: Analog design: op-amps, instrumentation amps, active filters

certifications.name: TIG (GTAW) — D17.1 Aerospace: steel, stainless, aluminum
